testcase.name: tc002

error.message: Unresolved compilation problems: Syntax error on token ".", @ expected after this token Syntax error on token ";", @ expected Syntax error on token ";", @ expected Syntax error, insert "SimpleName" to complete QualifiedName Syntax error, insert "Identifier (" to complete MethodHeaderName Syntax error, insert ")" to complete MethodDeclaration Syntax error on token "}", delete this token

testcase.error:
